hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: A brute force approach checks every pair. What is its time complexity?

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: Can you use a hash map to remember numbers you've seen so far, and check if the complement (`target - nums[i]`) has already appeared?

hints.title: Hint 3
hints.content: Iterate once: for each element, compute the complement. If it's in the map, you have your answer. Otherwise, store the current element in the map.
